title.en: MACsec Reference Tour: The SecY MIB, Cipher Suites, and Ethernet Data Encryption Devices
title.zh: MACsec 参考导览：SecY MIB、密码套件与以太网数据加密设备

blocks.en: By this point in IEEE Std 802.1AE-2018 (MAC Security, or MACsec) you already know how a MAC Security Entity (SecY) protects a frame. The final clauses answer three practical questions: how do you *manage* a SecY remotely (Clause 13), exactly which cryptography is it allowed to run (Clause 14), and how do you package SecYs into drop-in boxes that secure a link without touching the surrounding network (Clause 15, managed by Clause 16)? The three annexes then give you the conformance checklist (Annex A), the reading list (Annex B), and worked numeric examples (Annex C). Think of this lesson as the reference shelf you reach for after the architecture is understood.
blocks.zh: 学到 IEEE Std 802.1AE-2018（MAC 安全，简称 MACsec）的这一部分时，你已经了解 MAC 安全实体（SecY）如何保护一帧。最后这几个条款回答三个实际问题：如何远程*管理*一个 SecY（第 13 条）、它被允许运行哪些精确的密码算法（第 14 条），以及如何把 SecY 封装成即插即用的盒子，在不改动周边网络的前提下保护链路（第 15 条，由第 16 条管理）。三个附录则给出一致性核对清单（附录 A）、参考书目（附录 B）和已算好的数值示例（附录 C）。可以把这节课当成理解完架构后随手翻阅的参考书架。

blocks.en: Clause 13 defines an SNMP-managed MIB (Management Information Base — a tree of remotely readable/writable objects) for one SecY (13.1). It plugs into the standard Internet management framework, meaning SMIv2 object syntax accessed over SNMP (13.2), and it does not reinvent generic counters: it reuses the IETF Interfaces MIB (IF-MIB) and the system group, modelling the SecY's Controlled Port and Uncontrolled Port as two interface-stack sublayers indexed by ifIndex (13.3). Because many objects are read-write/read-create, an attacker who can SET them could disable protection or break replay defence, so the standard insists on SNMPv3 cryptographic security and warns that even reading some counters helps an attacker tune an attack (13.4). Internally the module is organized into per-SecY, per-Secure-Channel (SC), and per-Secure-Association (SA) tables, with a separate set of statistics tables and two compliance statements — the original 2006 one (now deprecated) and the newer secyMIBTcCompliance that adds multiple traffic classes and extended-packet-number reporting (13.5). Clause 13.6 is the literal SMIv2 module text — every managed object spelled out.
blocks.zh: 第 13 条为单个 SecY 定义了一个由 SNMP 管理的 MIB（管理信息库——一棵可远程读写的对象树）（13.1）。它接入标准的互联网管理框架，即通过 SNMP 访问的 SMIv2 对象语法（13.2），并且不重造通用计数器：它复用 IETF 接口 MIB（IF-MIB）与 system 组，把 SecY 的受控端口和非受控端口建模为接口栈中两个以 ifIndex 索引的子层（13.3）。由于许多对象可读写/可读建（read-write/read-create），能够 SET 它们的攻击者可以关闭保护或破坏防重放，因此标准要求使用 SNMPv3 的密码安全，并警告即便只读取某些计数器也会帮助攻击者调校攻击（13.4）。模块内部按每 SecY、每安全通道（SC）、每安全关联（SA）组织成若干表，另有一套独立的统计表和两个一致性声明——原始的 2006 版（现已弃用）与较新的 secyMIBTcCompliance，后者新增多业务类别与扩展包号上报（13.5）。13.6 节是字面的 SMIv2 模块文本——每个被管对象都逐一写明。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 420 150" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="20" y="20" width="160" height="30"/><text x="100" y="39" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Controlled Port IF (ifIndex=j)</text><rect x="240" y="20" width="160" height="30"/><text x="320" y="39" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Uncontrolled Port IF (ifIndex=k)</text><rect x="130" y="100" width="160" height="30"/><text x="210" y="119" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">Physical Interface (ifIndex=i)</text><line x1="100" y1="50" x2="190" y2="100"/><line x1="320" y1="50" x2="230" y2="100"/></svg>

caption.en: Clause 13 models the SecY as two interface-stack sublayers (Controlled + Uncontrolled Port) stacked over the physical interface, both indexed by ifIndex in the IF-MIB (Fig 13-1).
caption.zh: 第 13 条把 SecY 建模为叠在物理接口之上的两个接口栈子层（受控端口 + 非受控端口），二者在 IF-MIB 中均以 ifIndex 索引（图 13-1）。

blocks.en: Clause 14 pins down the cryptography. A Cipher Suite is an interoperable bundle of algorithms plus parameter values (such as key size); naming a small fixed set keeps implementations interoperable (14.1). Every suite is described through one PROTECT and one VALIDATE operation taking the same inputs — Secure Association Key (SAK), Secure Channel Identifier (SCI), Packet Number (PN), the two MAC addresses, the SecTAG, and the user data — and producing Secure Data plus a 128-bit Integrity Check Value (ICV) (14.1). Every conformant suite must integrity-protect those fields, survive at least 2^32 - 1 frames per key, stay length-predictable, and must NOT need keys over 1024 bits or different keys for protect vs validate (14.2). Each suite's written spec must state whether it encrypts, its length expansion, its ICV length, and its key properties (14.3). Conformance (14.4) is governed by Table 14-1, which lists exactly four allowed suites by 8-octet identifier — and a full implementation must always offer at least one suite that does integrity *without* encryption.
blocks.zh: 第 14 条锁定密码学。密码套件是一组可互操作的算法加上参数取值（如密钥长度）；规定一个小而固定的集合可保证实现之间互操作（14.1）。每个套件都通过一个 PROTECT 和一个 VALIDATE 操作来描述，二者取相同输入——安全关联密钥（SAK）、安全通道标识（SCI）、包号（PN）、两个 MAC 地址、SecTAG 和用户数据——并产生安全数据加上一个 128 位的完整性校验值（ICV）（14.1）。每个符合标准的套件都必须对这些字段做完整性保护，在一个密钥下至少支撑 2^32 - 1 帧，长度可预测，且不得要求超过 1024 位的密钥或对保护与校验使用不同密钥（14.2）。每个套件的书面规范必须说明它是否加密、长度扩展量、ICV 长度及密钥属性（14.3）。一致性（14.4）由表 14-1 约束，该表以 8 字节标识符精确列出四个被允许的套件——且完整实现必须始终提供至少一个只做完整性、*不*加密的套件。

blocks.en: The four allowed suites are all Galois/Counter Mode (GCM) over AES. GCM-AES-128 is the mandatory Default Cipher Suite: a 128-bit key, a 96-bit IV built from the 64-bit SCI followed by the 32-bit PN, and a 128-bit ICV (14.5). GCM-AES-256 is identical but with a 256-bit key (14.6). The two XPN (eXtended Packet Number) suites, GCM-AES-XPN-128 (14.7) and GCM-AES-XPN-256 (14.8), use a 64-bit packet number so high-speed links don't exhaust the counter; they carry a per-Connectivity-Association 96-bit Salt and a per-SCI 32-bit Short SCI (SSCI), XORing them into the IV, and they drop the confidentiality-offset option. For each mode the standard precisely maps MACsec's terms onto the K/IV/A/P/C/T notation of NIST SP 800-38D, telling you exactly what is authenticated-only (the additional data A) versus encrypted (the plaintext P).
blocks.zh: 四个被允许的套件都是基于 AES 的伽罗瓦/计数器模式（GCM）。GCM-AES-128 是强制的默认密码套件：128 位密钥、由 64 位 SCI 后接 32 位 PN 构成的 96 位 IV，以及 128 位 ICV（14.5）。GCM-AES-256 完全相同，只是密钥为 256 位（14.6）。两个 XPN（扩展包号）套件，GCM-AES-XPN-128（14.7）与 GCM-AES-XPN-256（14.8），使用 64 位包号，使高速链路不会耗尽计数器；它们携带每连接关联的 96 位 Salt 和每 SCI 的 32 位短 SCI（SSCI），将其异或进 IV，并取消了机密性偏移选项。对每种模式，标准都把 MACsec 的术语精确映射到 NIST SP 800-38D 的 K/IV/A/P/C/T 记法上，明确告诉你哪些仅做认证（附加数据 A）、哪些被加密（明文 P）。

blocks.svg: <svg viewBox="0 0 440 90" xmlns="http://www.w3.org/2000/svg" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="1.5"><rect x="10" y="30" width="160" height="30"/><text x="90" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">SCI (64 bits)</text><rect x="170" y="30" width="120" height="30"/><text x="230" y="49" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="11" text-anchor="middle">PN (32 bits)</text><text x="150" y="20" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">96-bit IV (GCM-AES-128/256)</text><text x="230" y="80" fill="currentColor" stroke="none" font-size="10" text-anchor="middle">XPN: SSCI XOR Salt | 64-bit PN XOR Salt</text></svg>

caption.en: The GCM IV: for GCM-AES-128/256 it is SCI (64b) followed by PN (32b); the XPN suites widen the PN to 64 bits and mix in an SSCI and a Salt (14.5-14.8).
caption.zh: GCM 的 IV：GCM-AES-128/256 中为 SCI（64 位）后接 PN（32 位）；XPN 套件把 PN 拓宽至 64 位并混入 SSCI 与 Salt（14.5-14.8）。

blocks.en: Clause 15 introduces the Ethernet Data Encryption device (EDE) — a two-port forwarding box where one port (the red side) carries plain frames and the other (the black side) carries MACsec-protected frames (15.1). The idea is separation of concerns: an EDE is a small, easy-to-validate appliance that adds security to a link without the rest of the network having to know. The simplest type is the EDE-M, a VLAN-unaware two-port MAC Bridge with one SecY; a pair of EDE-Ms can secure a point-to-point LAN between two bridges (15.2). When traffic must cross a Provider Bridged Network (PBN — a carrier network that uses S-VLAN tags for service selection), the VLAN tags can't be encrypted because the provider must read and edit them (15.3). The standard then gives four ways to secure PBN connectivity: an EDE-M priority-tagging frames (15.4); an EDE-CS bridging a red-side C-tagged interface to a black-side S-tagged one (15.5); an EDE-CC retaining C-VLAN selection with two C-VLAN components (15.6); and an EDE-SS retaining S-VLAN selection with two S-VLAN components (15.7).
blocks.zh: 第 15 条引入以太网数据加密设备（EDE）——一个双端口转发盒，一个端口（红侧）承载明文帧，另一个端口（黑侧）承载受 MACsec 保护的帧（15.1）。其思想是关注点分离：EDE 是一个小巧、易于验证的设备，为链路增加安全性而无需网络其余部分知情。最简单的类型是 EDE-M，一个不感知 VLAN 的双端口 MAC 网桥，带一个 SecY；一对 EDE-M 可保护两个网桥之间的点到点 LAN（15.2）。当流量必须穿越运营商桥接网络（PBN——使用 S-VLAN 标签做业务选择的运营商网络）时，VLAN 标签不能被加密，因为运营商必须读取并修改它们（15.3）。随后标准给出四种保护 PBN 连通性的方法：EDE-M 做优先级打标（15.4）；EDE-CS 把红侧 C 标接口桥接到黑侧 S 标接口（15.5）；EDE-CC 用两个 C-VLAN 组件保留 C-VLAN 选择（15.6）；EDE-SS 用两个 S-VLAN 组件保留 S-VLAN 选择（15.7）。

blocks.en:
flowchart LR
  R[Red side: plain frame] --> S[SecY: PROTECT]
  S --> T[Add SecTAG + ICV]
  T --> B[Black side: MACsec frame]
  B -. across PBN .-> B2[Peer EDE black side]
  B2 --> V[SecY: VALIDATE]
  V --> R2[Red side: plain frame]
blocks.zh:
flowchart LR
  R[红侧：明文帧] --> S[SecY：PROTECT]
  S --> T[添加 SecTAG + ICV]
  T --> B[黑侧：MACsec 帧]
  B -. 穿越 PBN .-> B2[对端 EDE 黑侧]
  B2 --> V[SecY：VALIDATE]
  V --> R2[红侧：明文帧]

blocks.en: Two more parts of Clause 15 keep EDEs deployable. Interoperability (15.8) is mostly about which group MAC address each EDE's Port Access Entity (PAE — the 802.1X entity that runs authentication and key agreement) uses for EAPOL PDUs, summarised in Tables 15-1 and 15-2: an address must be forwarded, not filtered, by every bridge between the two peers, so an EDE-M uses the Nearest Customer Bridge address (01-80-C2-00-00-00) while an EDE-CC uses its own EDE-CC PEP address (01-80-C2-00-00-1F). Finally, 15.9 covers how EDEs coexist with User Network Interface (UNI) access and Connectivity Fault Management (CFM): provider CFM PDUs are sourced and sunk inside the EDE rather than leaking to red-side systems, and a PEP can optionally relay unprotected traffic for direct UNI access.
blocks.zh: 第 15 条还有两部分让 EDE 可落地部署。互操作性（15.8）主要是关于每个 EDE 的端口接入实体（PAE——运行认证与密钥协商的 802.1X 实体）为 EAPOL PDU 使用哪个组 MAC 地址，归纳于表 15-1 和表 15-2：所选地址必须被两个对端之间的每个网桥转发而非过滤，因此 EDE-M 使用最近客户网桥地址（01-80-C2-00-00-00），而 EDE-CC 使用自己的 EDE-CC PEP 地址（01-80-C2-00-00-1F）。最后，15.9 讲述 EDE 如何与用户网络接口（UNI）访问及连通性故障管理（CFM）共存：运营商的 CFM PDU 在 EDE 内部被生成与终结而非泄漏到红侧系统，且 PEP 可选地为直接 UNI 访问中继未保护流量。

blocks.en: Mnemonic for the EDE family: the suffix names the two bridge components. M = one VLAN-unaware MAC bridge; CS = a C-VLAN plus an S-VLAN component (like a Provider Edge Bridge); CC = two C-VLAN components; SS = two S-VLAN components. CC and SS exist to add MACsec to an existing link with minimal reconfiguration — the outer tag they add always matches the inner tag.
blocks.zh: EDE 家族的助记法：后缀指明两个网桥组件。M = 一个不感知 VLAN 的 MAC 网桥；CS = 一个 C-VLAN 加一个 S-VLAN 组件（类似运营商边缘网桥）；CC = 两个 C-VLAN 组件；SS = 两个 S-VLAN 组件。CC 与 SS 的存在是为了以最小重配置给既有链路加上 MACsec——它们添加的外层标签始终与内层标签一致。

blocks.en: Clause 16 closes the loop: it explains how to manage each EDE type by reusing existing MIBs rather than inventing new ones. The same sensitivity warnings apply, often with more weight for an EDE (16.1). An EDE-M is managed as a VLAN-unaware MAC Bridge using the 802.1Q MIBs, with its black-side SecY managed by the Clause 13 MIB and its PAE by the 802.1X MIB; sysDescr should label it 'EDE-M' (16.2). An EDE-CS is managed like a Provider Edge Bridge, each Provider Edge Port carrying a SecY (16.3). For an EDE-CC or EDE-SS (16.4) the edge component has ComponentID 1 and can be managed alone — instantiating a Provider Edge Port automatically creates the matching Customer Network Port whose tagging follows the Clause 15 restrictions — while the network component (ComponentID 2) is managed only when needed, for example for CFM or queue disciplines.
blocks.zh: 第 16 条收尾：它说明如何通过复用既有 MIB 来管理每种 EDE，而非另造新的。同样的敏感性警告适用，对 EDE 往往分量更重（16.1）。EDE-M 被当作不感知 VLAN 的 MAC 网桥，用 802.1Q 的 MIB 管理，其黑侧 SecY 由第 13 条的 MIB 管理、其 PAE 由 802.1X 的 MIB 管理；sysDescr 应标注为“EDE-M”（16.2）。EDE-CS 像运营商边缘网桥那样管理，每个运营商边缘端口承载一个 SecY（16.3）。对 EDE-CC 或 EDE-SS（16.4），边缘组件的 ComponentID 为 1 且可单独管理——实例化一个运营商边缘端口会自动创建相匹配的客户网络端口，其打标遵循第 15 条的约束——而网络组件（ComponentID 2）仅在需要时管理，例如用于 CFM 或队列调度。

summary.en: Coverage map: every clause 13-16 and Annexes A/B/C, by number
summary.zh: 覆盖地图：第 13-16 条及附录 A/B/C 逐条对照

blocks.en: Clause 13 — SecY MIB: 13.1 introduction (SMIv2 MIB for one SecY); 13.2 the Internet-Standard Management Framework (SMI/SNMP, RFC 3410); 13.3 relationship to other MIBs (system group, IF-MIB, Controlled/Uncontrolled Ports as sublayers); 13.4 security considerations (read-write objects are attack-sensitive; require SNMPv3); 13.5 structure of the module (per-SecY/SC/SA tables, statistics tables, deprecated secyMIBCompliance vs newer secyMIBTcCompliance); 13.6 the literal SecY MIB SMIv2 definitions. Clause 14 — Cipher Suites: 14.1 use (PROTECT/VALIDATE with SAK, SCI, PN, addresses, SecTAG); 14.2 capabilities (integrity for listed fields, 2^32-1 frames/key, no key over 1024 bits); 14.3 specification requirements; 14.4 conformance (Table 14-1, four allowed suites, at least one integrity-only); 14.5 Default GCM-AES-128 (128-bit key, 96-bit IV = SCI||PN, 128-bit ICV); 14.6 GCM-AES-256; 14.7 GCM-AES-XPN-128 (64-bit PN, Salt + SSCI); 14.8 GCM-AES-XPN-256. Clause 15 — EDEs: 15.1 characteristics (two-port red/black box, separation of concerns, taxonomy); 15.2 securing LANs with EDE-Ms; 15.3 securing connectivity across PBNs (tags can't be encrypted); 15.4 PBN with EDE-M (priority tagging); 15.5 EDE-CS (C-tagged red, S-tagged black); 15.6 EDE-CC (two C-VLAN components); 15.7 EDE-SS (two S-VLAN components); 15.8 interoperability (PAE group addresses, Tables 15-1/15-2); 15.9 EDEs, CFM, and UNI access. Clause 16 — managing EDEs: 16.1 security considerations; 16.2 EDE-M management (MAC Bridge MIBs + Clause 13 SecY MIB + 802.1X MIB); 16.3 EDE-CS management (Provider Edge Bridge); 16.4 EDE-CC/EDE-SS management (edge ComponentID 1, network ComponentID 2). Annex A (normative) — PICS proforma: the conformance questionnaire, status symbols (M/O/X/conditional) and predicates a supplier fills in to claim conformance. Annex B (informative) — Bibliography: non-normative references (RFCs 3410/5116, NIST SP 800-38D background by McGrew/Viega, MEF 16, etc.). Annex C (informative) — MACsec test vectors: worked numeric examples (54/60/61/65/75/79-octet frames) showing the unprotected frame and the resulting integrity-protected or encrypted frame for each of the four cipher suites.
blocks.zh: 第 13 条——SecY MIB：13.1 引言（为单个 SecY 的 SMIv2 MIB）；13.2 互联网标准管理框架（SMI/SNMP，RFC 3410）；13.3 与其他 MIB 的关系（system 组、IF-MIB、受控/非受控端口作为子层）；13.4 安全考量（可读写对象对攻击敏感；要求 SNMPv3）；13.5 模块结构（每 SecY/SC/SA 表、统计表、已弃用的 secyMIBCompliance 与较新的 secyMIBTcCompliance）；13.6 字面的 SecY MIB SMIv2 定义。第 14 条——密码套件：14.1 使用（用 SAK、SCI、PN、地址、SecTAG 做 PROTECT/VALIDATE）；14.2 能力（对所列字段做完整性、每密钥 2^32-1 帧、密钥不超过 1024 位）；14.3 规范要求；14.4 一致性（表 14-1，四个被允许套件，至少一个仅完整性）；14.5 默认 GCM-AES-128（128 位密钥、96 位 IV = SCI||PN、128 位 ICV）；14.6 GCM-AES-256；14.7 GCM-AES-XPN-128（64 位 PN、Salt + SSCI）；14.8 GCM-AES-XPN-256。第 15 条——EDE：15.1 特性（双端口红/黑盒、关注点分离、分类）；15.2 用 EDE-M 保护 LAN；15.3 跨 PBN 保护连通性（标签不能加密）；15.4 用 EDE-M 跨 PBN（优先级打标）；15.5 EDE-CS（红侧 C 标、黑侧 S 标）；15.6 EDE-CC（两个 C-VLAN 组件）；15.7 EDE-SS（两个 S-VLAN 组件）；15.8 互操作性（PAE 组地址，表 15-1/15-2）；15.9 EDE、CFM 与 UNI 访问。第 16 条——管理 EDE：16.1 安全考量；16.2 EDE-M 管理（MAC 网桥 MIB + 第 13 条 SecY MIB + 802.1X MIB）；16.3 EDE-CS 管理（运营商边缘网桥）；16.4 EDE-CC/EDE-SS 管理（边缘组件 ComponentID 1、网络组件 ComponentID 2）。附录 A（规范性）——PICS 一致性声明表：供应商填写以声明一致性的问卷，含状态符号（M/O/X/条件）与谓词。附录 B（资料性）——参考书目：非规范性引用（RFC 3410/5116、McGrew/Viega 关于 NIST SP 800-38D 的背景、MEF 16 等）。附录 C（资料性）——MACsec 测试向量：已算好的数值示例（54/60/61/65/75/79 字节帧），针对四个密码套件分别展示未保护帧及相应的完整性保护或加密后帧。

cites.note: Clause 13: SecY MIB introduction, Internet-Standard Management Framework, relationship to IF-MIB, security considerations, MIB structure
Clause 14: Cipher Suite use/capabilities/spec/conformance (Table 14-1) and the four GCM-AES suites including XPN
Clause 15: EDE characteristics, EDE-M/CS/CC/SS, PBN securing, interoperability (PAE group addresses), CFM/UNI
Clause 16: managing EDE-M/CS/CC/SS via 802.1Q, Clause 13 SecY, and 802.1X MIBs
Annex A (normative) PICS proforma: structure, status symbols, conditional predicates
Annex C (informative) MACsec test vectors: worked frame examples
